test_cases.input_summary: Hard news — Northfield Borough Council votes 11-4 to close all three public libraries by end of financial year, £1.4m budget shortfall, 23,000 monthly visitors affected. Target: regional daily newspaper.

Feature — 34 Scottish Highlands hill-farming families adopt precision agricultural technology (satellite sensors, drones, weather monitoring), cutting costs 22% in two years; oldest participant is 71, many had never used smartphones before. Target: national farming magazine.

Analysis — university research shows pupils who change schools between ages 11-16 score 8.3 grade points lower in GCSEs; effect strongest in Year 10-11; researchers link cause to housing benefit rules that move families across local authority boundaries. Target: national newspaper education supplement.
